DEFAULT.TITLE: GrowLogic
DEFAULT.DESCRIPTION: AI-powered precision diagnostics for your houseplants. Receive smart watering alerts and keep your indoors lush and green.
DEFAULT.KEYWORDS: IoT, artificial intelligence, watering alerts, humidity and temperature sensors, plant diagnostics, gardening assistance, plant care, houseplants
